overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a vast prairie at dusk. The scene transitions from twilight to moonlit night as the character passes a rider on horseback and approaches a distant windmill under a bright full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie at dusk with distant industrial smoke

events.description: rider on horseback passes by from the left side, moving ahead of the character
full moon becomes visible on the horizon, casting a soft glow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass toward a distant smoke plume

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past from left to right, moving ahead into the distance

entered.detail: tall column of dark smoke rising vertically from an industrial source beyond the hills
cluster of large oak trees with dense dark foliage silhouetted against the twilight sky
scattered oak trees on the right hillside
rolling hill covered in tall green grass and yellow wildflowers
narrow dirt path winding through the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie at dusk with an industrial smoke plume visible in the distance. The character walks along a dirt trail through tall grass and wildflowers. Another rider on horseback passes by from the left, galloping ahead into the twilight. As the moon rises on the horizon, the landscape transitions from dusk to moonlit night.

scene_state.functional_zone: open moonlit prairie with scattered trees

events.description: moon rises higher, becoming the primary light source and illuminating the field with silver light

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily through the open field under the bright full moon

entered.detail: large bright full moon low on the horizon, casting long shadows
massive oak tree with spreading branches silhouetted against the moonlit sky
dense dark tree line marking the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive moonlit prairie, the full moon now high enough to illuminate the landscape with a cool silver glow. A large oak tree stands silhouetted on the left while the distant forest line marks the horizon. The industrial smoke and hills from the previous segment have passed out of view behind.

events.description: wooden windmill comes into view on the horizon ahead, silhouetted against the moonlit sky
character passes the windmill on the right side, continuing toward the moon

agents.ego_description: walking toward the windmill and passing it on the right, continuing across the open field

entered.detail: traditional wooden windmill with four blades, silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: A wooden windmill appears on the horizon ahead, serving as a landmark in the open prairie. The character walks toward it and passes by on the right, with the full moon now positioned to the right of the frame. The landscape remains an open grassy field with the distant forest line still visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast prairie that transforms from a twilight dusk into a cool, moonlit night. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail through tall grass and wildflowers, passing a galloping rider as a distant industrial smoke plume lingers on the horizon. As the moon rises, the lighting shifts from the warm tones of dusk to a silver glow, causing the industrial skyline to fade behind the camera while a silhouetted oak tree emerges on the left. The scene then opens further across the expansive plains toward a distant forest line, before the camera guides the character toward a wooden windmill. Finally, the movement passes the windmill on the right under the brilliance of a high full moon positioned over the open grassy field.
